questions.question: Explain the difference between a Check Sum and a Cyclic Redundancy Check (CRC) in the context of error detection in computer networks. (10 marks)

A device at node A sends a block of data to a device at node B. The block size is 1024 bits. The Check Sum for this block is calculated as 16 bits. What are the possible block sizes for this Check Sum? (5 marks)
Describe the step-by-step process of how a Point to Point Protocol (PPP) generates a Check Sum for a frame. (10 marks)
